basics.name: Cunyu Liu
basics.summary: Incoming Ph.D. student at Zhejiang University working on AI for Science, domain LLMs, multi-agent systems, RAG, and scientific computing.

work.summary: Built AI tooling for automated testing workflows, defect coverage review, BOSS CLI, and OpenClaw Skill Gateway integrations.
highlights: Implemented BBC/BBQ test case polishing workflows with Coze Bot API, Aily, Fornax GPT, Spring Boot, Redis queues, and multimodal prompts.
Built RAG-based defect automation coverage review with BBQ/BBC dual recall, multimodal completeness checks, confidence scoring, and Feishu Bitable output.
Developed Bits/BOSS testing tools for tenant creation, asset unsubscribe, usage query/reporting, and mock-time scenarios.

work.company: Tsinghua University, Institute for AI Industry Research / Department of Chemical Engineering
work.summary: Built Electrolyte Lab, a multi-agent platform for battery electrolyte research.
highlights: Designed LangGraph workflows with conditional routing, specialized agents, quality-control nodes, and state persistence.
Built RAG over 180k+ papers with Milvus, Elasticsearch BM25, RRF fusion, bge-m3 embeddings, and bge-reranker-v2-m3.
Implemented knowledge graph extraction, Skill-based API orchestration, and constrained Bayesian optimization.

work.summary: Built an AI platform for RNA magnesium binding and oxidation reactivity analysis.
highlights: Used LightGBM, soft-voting ensembles, custom losses, Bayesian optimization, and window-based sequence features.
Explored inverse RNA sequence generation and interpretable secondary-structure analysis.

work.company: Zhejiang University, College of Pharmaceutical Sciences
work.summary: Studied byte-level representation learning and dynamic chunking for RNA language models.
highlights: Processed 32.5M ncRNA records from RNACentral and obtained 16.4M deduplicated training sequences using MMseqs2.
Trained entropy models and BLT-style global models for RNA sequence modeling.

education.institution: Zhejiang University, College of Artificial Intelligence
North University of China, School of Software

portfolio.name: Electrolyte Lab: Multi-Agent Platform for Battery Electrolyte Research
portfolio.description: LangGraph multi-agent workflows, scientific RAG, knowledge graph extraction, and closed-loop formulation optimization.

portfolio.name: ChemMind: Chemistry Domain QA System
portfolio.description: Domain SFT and evaluation pipeline for chemistry QA with Qwen3-8B, QLoRA, MinerU, and LLM-as-a-Judge.

portfolio.name: AI Platform for RNA Reactivity
portfolio.description: Machine learning and statistical modeling platform for RNA magnesium binding, oxidation behavior, and interpretable secondary-structure analysis.
